data.title: Faraday Future Leaders Attend the 2026 Columbia Global Sustainability Summit Held at Columbia University, Showcase FF EAI Robotics and Discuss Potential Applications in Education
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a California-based EAI company, revealed that their Global President, Jerry Wang, and Chris Chen, Co-CEO of FF AI-Robotics, were present at the 2026 Columbia Global Sustainability Summit at Columbia University in New York on April 5th. Jerry Wang engaged in a panel discussion on the Global Governance Track called “Reim”.
Shipping Stalls As Tehran Dictates Terms In Hormuz – FT

data.title: 50% of Gen Z utilizes AI, yet their sentiments are changing negatively, as per a Gallup study on young adults.
data.description: A recent research conducted by Gallup revealed a concerning trend among young adults, indicating a decrease in hopefulness and an increase in feelings of anger towards artificial intelligence. The study highlighted significant shifts in attitudes towards AI among this demographic, with a notable decline in optimism and a rise in negative emotions. This shift in sentiment raises important questions about the impact of AI on the younger generation, suggesting a growing unease and discontent towards this advancing technology.

data.title: Strait of Hormuz may reopen after Iran-cease fire. Ship traffic drops due to fragile agreement.
data.description: Ships are cautious when navigating near the Iranian coast in the strait due to the tenuous agreement in place. Consequently, there has been a noticeable decrease in the volume of vessels passing through this route.
EU Economy Commissioner Valdis Dombrovskis said the European Commission is preparing to lower its growth forecast for this year, according to the Financial Times.
Brussels cautions that the EU will not escape a stagflationary shock, underscoring looming economic risks – FT.
Kyodo reports that Japan may release roughly 20 days of its oil reserves.
Sichuan Yahua Industrial Group of China hopes to get Zimbabwe’s approval to export lithium concentrate, boosting its presence in the international market.
Kazakhstan’s central bank reported that its net gold and foreign currency reserves dropped 8.8% in March, totaling $65.083 billion.

data.title: Comcast Technology Solutions Selected by Great American Media for Managed Channel Origination and Distribution
data.description: A long-term contract has been established to provide dependable and affordable origination, playout, and distribution services for pay-TV through Comcast Media360™. Great American Media will utilize Comcast MediaOrigination, a component of Comcast Media360, for its collection of family-friendly channels, such as Great American Family East.
